title: Alexander Dalgarno
body: Alexander Dalgarno FRS (5 January 1928 – 9 April 2015) was a British physicist who was a Phillips Professor of Astronomy at Harvard University.
categories: British fellows of the Royal Society
Fellows of the American Geophysical Union
Fellows of the American Physical Society
Fellows of the Royal Astronomical Society
Members of the International Academy of Quantum Molecular Science
Members of the United States National Academy of Sciences
Recipients of the Gold Medal of the Royal Astronomical Society
